claim: Progressive disclosure in skills: YAML loads always, full skill.md loads on activation, references/scripts load only when called; keeps context efficient
actionable: Structure skills with compact skill.md (max 200 lines), reference files for detailed docs, scripts for code; Claude loads each tier only when needed.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: The golden rule: keep skill.md under 200 lines max; this is the threshold for LLM efficient scanning to decide what to load next
actionable: Treat skill.md as a table of contents pointing to detailed references; move implementation details to reference files with 200-300 lines each.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Skill descriptions need three things: trigger (when to use), anti-triggers (when not to use), and outcome (what it produces); vague descriptions cause only 20% activation rates
actionable: Write skill descriptions with explicit triggers, anti-triggers, and outcome statements to improve activation rates from typical 20% to much higher.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Many marketplace skills are poorly structured (1000+ line skill.md, no references folder, no progressive disclosure); use skill creator skill to refactor them automatically
actionable: Take bloated skills from marketplaces, run them through the skill creator skill with request to refactor under 200 lines and move details to references folder.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Refactoring a 400-line skill to 148 lines (60% reduction) using skill creator maintains quality while drastically reducing tokens loaded per activation
actionable: Expect 40-60% reduction in context usage when refactoring unstructured skills; test with evals to confirm quality doesn't degrade.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Skills without business context are generic and less valuable; add shared brand context (ICP, positioning, voice) to references so skills produce on-brand outputs
actionable: Create a shared brand context folder with positioning, ICP, tone examples; reference it from all skills so Claude understands your business.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Use skill creator skill's evals feature to run skills 5-10 times against 3-5 criteria, grade each run, and get structured reports to measure improvements
actionable: Run evals on skills targeting specific criteria (accuracy, tone, format); compare before/after refactoring to verify quality and optimization.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Skills should have a learnings.md file that captures what works from each run (e.g., 'articles opening with direct answer rank faster') to improve continuously
actionable: After each skill run, record patterns that worked into learnings.md; have Claude check this file on future runs to reinforce successful patterns.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins

claim: Skills can call other skills to form workflows; copywriting skill can trigger humanizer skill before saving, creating a coordinated AI workforce
actionable: Design skills with explicit calls to other skills when needed (e.g., run X skill, then pass output to Y skill) to build multi-step workflows.
source_title: Every Level of Claude Code Skills in 27 mins
